review_text: I bought my iPad Mini in April of 2021. I recently began to have problems with the touch screen. There is a specific area on my screen that does not respond well anymore. I have to tap firmly several times before it finally responds. I am horribly disappointed that this Apple product turned out to be a lemon. I don’t have enough money to buy a new one. Is there any way to fix this problem??

non-essential_feature.evidence_span: I don’t have enough money to buy a new one.
non-essential_feature.reason: The customer implies that the touch screen issue is not an essential feature, as they cannot afford a new one.

iteration_detail.validation_reason: The review mentions a touch screen issue, dissatisfaction with the product, financial constraints, and a request for a solution. The current feature bundle does not cover these aspects comprehensively.

missing_features.name: Touch Screen Responsiveness
missing_features.description: Detects issues with the touch screen responsiveness, such as unresponsive areas or slow response times.

missing_features.name: Product Quality Assessment
missing_features.description: Identifies if the product is of poor quality, such as being a 'lemon'.

missing_features.name: Customer Financial Constraints
missing_features.description: Recognizes when the customer is constrained by financial limitations, such as not being able to afford a replacement.

missing_features.name: Customer Satisfaction
missing_features.description: Assesses the customer's level of satisfaction with the product, which can be inferred from expressions of disappointment.

missing_features.name: Customer Support Inquiry
missing_features.description: Identifies when the customer is seeking support or a solution to their problem.
